analysis:
Based on your data analysis:

**1. Best CSP:**
NVDA $185 strike, **2026-06-05**, 33 DTE, $4.80-$4.95 bid/ask, 0.28 delta, 29.1% annualized return

**2. Best CC (Position Income):**
NVDA $210 strike, **2026-06-18**, 46 DTE, $7.25-$7.35 bid/ask, 0.38 delta, 29.2% annualized return

**3. Best LEAPS:**
MSFT $195 strike, **2028-01-21**, 628 DTE, $229.50-$234.05 bid/ask, 0.99 delta, 5.8% extrinsic - only LEAPS candidate not filtered out by timing/trend issues

**4. Bull Call Spreads:**
None available

**5. IVP Environment:**
Mixed volatility regime - MSFT at 91% IVP presenting value, but most other names (NVDA 63%, AAPL 60%) showing elevated premiums near cycle highs, favoring income collection over LEAPS purchases.
